_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.

event_queue.event: Q1 FY2027 earnings on 2026-05-27 (3 days out). Consensus $2.40B revenue / $0.79-0.80 EPS; options pricing 13% move. ATH $196.33 close (May 22). Citi $215, Melius $220, Stifel $210. Post-earnings priority: re-run DCF and revise story_narrative — current IV $119.91 is pre-guide stale.
